title: Partition to K Equal Sum Subsets

testcases.input: nums = [4,3,2,3,5,2,1], k = 4 Output: true Explanation: It is possible to divide it into 4 subsets (5), (1, 4), (2,3), (2,3) with equal sums.
testcases.expectedOutput: true Explanation: It is possible to divide it into 4 subsets (5), (1, 4), (2,3), (2,3) with equal sums.
